text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, October 26. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Good call on checking that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Bedtime can be a challenge. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we got invited to a neighbor's house. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted the plans. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Checking on some house maintenance items. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. I can help troubleshoot that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sounds exciting! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
